publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-01-09 18:31:47 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Subject files, field records, reports, checklists, photographs, and other papers.
did.abstract: Subject files, field records, reports, and checklists, photographs, and other papers of an expert birder from the Rochester, New York area; records pertain mostly to Central New York State, but include accounts of trips to Alaska, Florida, and other places.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Francis G. Scheider was a birder, amateur ornithologist, and field collaborator of the Cornell University Laboratory of Ornithology.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Subject files, field records, reports, and checklists, photographs, and other papers of an expert birder from the Rochester, New York area; records pertain mostly to Central New York State, but include accounts of trips to Alaska, Florida, and other places.

defitem.label: Series II. Chronological records and reports

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Francis G. Scheider Papers, #4856. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes birding trips to Alaska and other states; New York State Breeding Bird Atlas Project; Kingbird; Christmas counts; New York State Avian Record Committee; correspondence with individuals.

did.unittitle: Breeding Bird Atlas Project (New York State)
Christmas Count Maps - Central New York
Coronado National Forest - Cove Creek Canyon
Massachussetts, Cape Ann Trips; Cumulative Totals
Minor, William and Maureen - Red-tailed hawk
New York, Jamaica Bay Wildlife Refuge
New York State Avian Record Committee (NYSARC) - List for Regional Edition
New York State Federation of Bird Clubs
Series II. Chronological records and reports

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes field records; regional reports; field checklists; birding notes; printed material.

did.unittitle: Fall Shorebird Migration in Central New York
Field Checklist, Field Records, Region V Summary
Region V, Oneida Lake Basin - Fall
Region V, Oneida lake Basin - Winter
Region V - Oneida Lake Basin - Dec.-June
Birding notes; printed material, including Birding,
Birding notes; printed material, including Birding,
